title: VaultProvider
description:
A simple vault provider for the Vault plugin.
Supports player accounts and banks
body:
# VaultProvider

**VaultProvider** is an economy provider for [Vault](https://github.com/milkbowl/Vault), supporting player accounts and bank accounts with flexible management options.

### Features

- **Player Accounts & Banks**  
  Manage individual player accounts and banks with ease.

- **Configurable Starting Balance**  
  Set a customizable starting balance for new players in the configuration.

- **Configurable Commands**  
  Most commands can be enabled or disabled in the configuration file.

- **Customizable Currency**  
  Easily change the currency name in the configuration settings to suit your needs.

- **Fully Customizable Messages**  
  All in-game messages can be tailored to fit your server's theme and style.

- **Built-in Account Management**  
  VaultProvider includes commands to manage player accounts and banks directly. For mass player management, use selectors like `@p` for the nearest player or `@a[distance=0..64]` to target all players within 64 blocks.
